useCases.title: Assortment Rationalization Engine
statusQuo: Category managers pull item-level sales into 40-tab spreadsheets and manually rank SKUs each quarter.
Transferable-demand effects are guessed at, so delist decisions routinely strand loyal shoppers.
Line reviews slip by weeks because MFCS extracts, syndicated data, and margin files must be stitched by hand.
agentification: Continuously scores every SKU in BigQuery on productivity, incrementality, and transferable demand.
Generates a ranked keep/delist/swap recommendation deck for each category ahead of line review.
Drafts the delist and space-reallocation proposal in Looker and routes it to the Category Manager for approval.

useCases.title: Planogram Compliance Analyzer
statusQuo: Field teams photograph shelves and email images that sit unreviewed for weeks.
Compliance is inferred from a 5% store sample walked by third-party auditors twice a year.
Sales dips from botched resets are discovered only after the category post-mortem.
agentification: Analyzes shelf images and POS sales-rate deviations against the planogram of record after every reset window.
Flags facings, position, and missing-item violations store by store with photo evidence.
Creates corrective tasks for store teams and escalates chronic non-compliance to the Planogram Manager.

useCases.title: Size & Pack Optimization Engine
statusQuo: Planners apply last year's chain-average size curve to every store cluster in a spreadsheet.
Store-level size selling patterns live in BigQuery but never make it into the buy sheet.
Fragmented size runs force early markdowns while top sizes stock out in week three.
agentification: Learns store-cluster size curves from transaction history and localizes pack configurations per program.
Recommends optimized size-pack ratios directly into the MFCS buy plan before purchase orders cut.
Notifies the Merchandise Planner when in-season selling diverges from the planned curve beyond tolerance.

useCases.title: New Item Launch Orchestrator

kpis.label: Item data error rate at setup

statusQuo: New-item forms bounce between vendor, merchandising, and data teams over email for two weeks.
Attribute gaps and wrong cost/retail entries are caught only when stores can't scan the item.
No one tracks whether first allocation actually landed before the ad breaks.
agentification: Validates vendor-submitted item attributes, costs, and hierarchy placement before MFCS entry.
Orchestrates setup, first allocation, and price activation as a tracked launch runbook with owners and SLAs.
Escalates blocked steps and publishes a launch-readiness scorecard to Looker for every new item.

useCases.title: Vendor Performance Scorecard Analyzer
statusQuo: Analysts assemble quarterly vendor scorecards by exporting PO, receipt, and invoice data into Excel.
Fill-rate and lead-time misses surface a quarter late, long after negotiation leverage is gone.
Chargeback-eligible violations go unclaimed because nobody has time to document them.
agentification: Computes fill rate, on-time delivery, lead-time variance, and invoice accuracy per vendor weekly in BigQuery.
Drafts the quarterly business review deck with trend narratives and benchmark comparisons per vendor.
Generates compliance-claim packets with PO-level evidence and routes them to the Vendor Performance Manager.

useCases.title: Demand Forecast Exception Agent
statusQuo: Planners eyeball thousands of item-location forecast exceptions in Blue Yonder queues each Monday.
Override decisions rely on gut feel because weather, promo, and social signals live in separate tools.
Value-destroying overrides are never measured against what the statistical forecast would have done.
agentification: Triages the exception queue nightly, auto-clearing noise and enriching real exceptions with causal context.
Recommends override values with confidence intervals and the driver evidence behind each one.
Publishes a forecast-value-added report that scores every human override against the baseline.

useCases.title: DC Labor Planning Engine
statusQuo: Shift supervisors size tomorrow's waves from yesterday's volumes in a whiteboard-and-spreadsheet ritual.
Inbound surges force same-day scramble calls for temps at premium rates.
Labor standards in Manhattan and schedules in UKG are reconciled manually and disagree constantly.
agentification: Forecasts wave-level volume by function from Manhattan order pipelines and inbound ASNs.
Generates department-level shift plans in UKG Dimensions matched to forecast workload and labor standards.
Notifies the DC Operations Manager of projected capacity gaps 72 hours out with flex-labor options.

useCases.title: Inbound PO ETA Monitor
statusQuo: Analysts chase carrier portals and vendor emails one PO at a time to learn a shipment slipped.
Late inbound is discovered at the dock, blowing up appointment schedules for the whole day.
Downstream allocation plans assume on-time arrival because nobody updates ETAs in the system.
agentification: Ingests ASN, carrier tracking, and port milestone events to predict arrival slippage per PO.
Updates ETAs in Manhattan Active WM and rebalances dock appointments when a delay is confirmed.
Escalates at-risk POs feeding promotions or ad items to the Inventory Control Analyst with expedite options.

useCases.title: Store Replenishment Orchestrator
statusQuo: Allocators override system replenishment for hundreds of stores using static min/max rules from 2021.
Fast stores starve while slow stores drown because parameters are set at chain level.
Weekend demand spikes trigger Monday firefighting instead of Friday prevention.
agentification: Tunes item-store replenishment parameters continuously from sell-through, lead time, and presentation minimums.
Rebalances constrained inventory across stores by predicted lost-sales impact rather than fair-share splits.
Recommends parameter changes with projected in-stock lift and applies approved ones back into Blue Yonder.

useCases.title: Carrier Delivery SLA Analyzer

kpis.label: Cost per package variance vs. contract

statusQuo: Carrier scorecards are built monthly from CSV invoice dumps and are stale on arrival.
Invoice overcharges against contracted rates are spot-checked on a 2% sample.
Lane-level performance problems persist for quarters because no one connects tracking data to tenders.
agentification: Audits every carrier invoice against contract rate cards and delivery scans in BigQuery.
Drafts dispute claims for late deliveries and overbilling with shipment-level evidence attached.
Recommends lane reassignments to the Transportation Manager when a carrier trends below SLA.

useCases.title: Shrink Anomaly Analyzer

kpis.label: Time to flag suspicious register activity

statusQuo: LP analysts run canned exception reports and manually cross-reference refunds, voids, and discounts per cashier.
Sweethearting and refund fraud patterns emerge only at cycle-count time, months after the loss.
Field LP visits are scheduled by rotation, not by risk, so high-shrink stores go unvisited.
agentification: Scores every transaction stream nightly for void, refund, no-sale, and discount anomalies at cashier and store level.
Builds ranked case files linking POS events, timeclock data, and inventory adjustments for each anomaly cluster.
Routes high-confidence cases to the Loss Prevention Manager and prioritizes store visits by predicted shrink risk.

useCases.title: Store Labor Forecast Engine
statusQuo: Store managers copy last week's schedule forward and tweak it from memory.
Traffic, weather, and local-event drivers never reach the labor forecast in UKG.
Understaffed peak hours produce walkouts while overstaffed mornings burn payroll.
agentification: Forecasts 15-minute interval workload per store from POS transactions, traffic, weather, and event calendars.
Generates draft schedules in UKG Dimensions honoring skills, availability, and labor-law constraints.
Notifies managers of coverage gaps and recommends shift swaps before the schedule posts.

useCases.title: On-Shelf Availability Monitor
statusQuo: Out-of-stocks are found by shoppers and associates walking aisles, not by any system.
Phantom inventory shows on-hand in the system while the shelf sits empty for weeks.
Zone managers print gap-scan lists that are outdated before the shift ends.
agentification: Detects zero-sales anomalies against expected sell rates to infer empty shelves despite positive on-hand.
Creates prioritized shelf-recovery and cycle-count tasks on store devices, sequenced by lost-sales value.
Publishes a chain OSA scorecard to Looker and escalates stores trending below threshold to the Store Operations Director.

useCases.title: Store Task Compliance Agent
statusQuo: Task completion is self-reported by stores, and district managers have no way to verify it.
DMs spend Sunday nights compiling store dashboards from five systems before their weekly route.
Promo displays that never went up are discovered when the event's sales miss plan.
agentification: Cross-checks reported task completion against POS signals, labor punches, and photo evidence.
Drafts each District Manager's store-visit brief with exceptions, trends, and coaching points per location.
Escalates unverified promo setups to the district before the event's first weekend.

useCases.title: POS Exception Triage Agent

kpis.label: POS incident mean time to resolve

statusQuo: Associates call the help desk and wait on hold while a lane sits dark during peak.
The same tender, printer, and sync failures are re-diagnosed from scratch at every store.
Incident tickets carry no device telemetry, so triage starts with twenty questions.
agentification: Detects failing registers from Xstore telemetry and opens enriched Zendesk tickets before the store calls.
Recommends the proven fix from historical resolution patterns and walks the associate through it.
Escalates hardware-replacement cases with diagnostics attached and notifies the Store Manager of lane status.

useCases.title: PDP Content Quality Agent

kpis.label: Time to enrich a new product page

statusQuo: Merchandisers audit product pages one at a time against a checklist in a shared doc.
Thin descriptions and missing size charts are found via customer complaints, not monitoring.
Copywriting backlogs delay long-tail items from ever getting proper content.
agentification: Scans every PDP in Commerce Cloud for missing attributes, weak copy, image gaps, and broken cross-sells.
Drafts SEO-aware descriptions and bullet copy from supplier data for merchandiser approval.
Prioritizes fixes by GA4 traffic and revenue impact and publishes approved content back to the site.

useCases.title: Site Search Relevance Engine
statusQuo: The team reviews a top-50 null-results report monthly and hand-writes synonym rules.
Seasonal vocabulary shifts (e.g. 'puffer' vs 'quilted jacket') lag customer language by months.
Nobody knows which search rules help or hurt because there is no per-rule measurement.
agentification: Mines full search-log tails in BigQuery to detect null, low-click, and misrouted queries daily.
Generates synonym, redirect, and boost-and-bury rules and ships winners through automated A/B tests.
Notifies the Digital Merchandising Manager when trending queries have no matching assortment.

useCases.title: Cart Abandonment Recovery Orchestrator

kpis.label: Time from abandonment to first touch

statusQuo: One static abandon email fires 24 hours later with a blanket 15%-off code for everyone.
High-intent shoppers get the same treatment as bots and price-checkers.
Inventory sells out before the reminder sends, driving frustrated 'it's gone' sessions.
agentification: Scores each abandoned cart on purchase intent, margin, and stock risk from Segment and Commerce Cloud signals.
Chooses the recovery play per shopper — reminder, social proof, low-stock nudge, or minimal viable incentive.
Drafts and sends personalized journeys through Marketing Cloud and suppresses carts that self-recover.

useCases.title: Click-and-Collect SLA Monitor
statusQuo: Store pick queues are monitored by whoever remembers to check the tablet between customers.
Orders silently age past SLA and customers arrive to unpicked baskets.
Substitution decisions wait on a manager who is usually on the sales floor.
agentification: Tracks every BOPIS order against its SLA clock and predicts breaches from store pick-rate telemetry.
Escalates at-risk orders to store leadership and reroutes overflow to nearby locations with inventory.
Recommends substitutions from live availability and notifies the customer with accurate ready times.

useCases.title: Returns Abuse Analyzer
statusQuo: Return decisions are made per transaction with no view of the customer's cross-channel history.
Serial wardrobers and empty-box claimants are identified quarterly, after losses accumulate.
Blanket tightening of the return policy punishes loyal customers along with abusers.
agentification: Builds a cross-channel return-behavior graph per customer spanning web orders, store returns, and care tickets.
Scores each return claim in real time and routes only high-risk claims to manual review with evidence.
Recommends tiered policy actions — from receipt checks to account flags — and drafts case files for the Fraud Analyst.

useCases.title: Loyalty Churn Prediction Agent
statusQuo: Churn is defined as 12 months of silence, so intervention starts a year too late.
Save offers go to a static 'lapsed' segment refreshed monthly by an analyst.
High-value members quietly defect to competitors with no early-warning signal.
agentification: Scores every member weekly on lapse risk from purchase cadence decay, engagement, and browse signals.
Recommends the retention treatment per member — points bonus, category offer, or concierge outreach — by predicted incrementality.
Creates triggered save journeys in Marketing Cloud and reports saved-revenue attribution to the Loyalty Program Manager.

useCases.title: Next Best Offer Engine
statusQuo: Everyone in a segment gets the same monthly coupon regardless of what they actually buy.
In-store purchase history and online behavior sit in separate systems and are never joined for targeting.
Offer fatigue grows as members receive irrelevant categories week after week.
agentification: Unifies POS and digital signals in BigQuery to model each member's category propensities and price sensitivity.
Selects the next best offer per member per channel under budget and margin guardrails.
Publishes decisioned audiences to Marketing Cloud daily and retires offers that underperform their holdout.

useCases.title: Customer Care Triage Agent
statusQuo: Every ticket lands in one Zendesk queue and waits for a human to read, tag, and route it.
Agents swivel between order systems and the ticket to reconstruct what happened.
VIP customers with delivery failures wait behind password-reset requests.
agentification: Classifies inbound tickets by intent and urgency, enriched with live order and delivery status from Commerce Cloud.
Resolves where-is-my-order, return-label, and appeasement cases end to end under policy limits.
Routes complex cases to the right specialist queue with a drafted response and escalates VIP incidents to the Customer Care Director.

useCases.title: Voice of Customer Insights Analyzer

kpis.label: Time to surface an emerging product issue

statusQuo: An analyst reads a sample of reviews and tickets monthly and pastes quotes into a slide deck.
Sizing-runs-small complaints, defect clusters, and courier problems blur into one anecdote pile.
Merchants hear about product issues after the return-rate spike, not before.
agentification: Mines all reviews, care tickets, chat logs, and survey verbatims for themes, sentiment shifts, and defect signals.
Quantifies each theme's revenue and return-rate impact and links it to specific SKUs and vendors.
Drafts a weekly insights brief and escalates emerging defect clusters to merchandising and quality owners.

useCases.title: Lapsed Member Win-Back Orchestrator
statusQuo: One generic 'we miss you' blast goes to the entire lapsed file twice a year.
No distinction is made between members who moved, switched channels, or churned on price.
Reactivated members get no follow-up journey and immediately lapse again.
agentification: Segments lapsed members by inferred lapse reason using last-purchase context, store proximity, and browse signals.
Generates tailored win-back journeys per segment and tests offer depth against predicted reactivation value.
Creates a post-reactivation nurture sequence and reports cohort payback to the Retention Marketing Manager.

useCases.title: Markdown Optimization Engine
statusQuo: Markdowns follow a fixed 25/50/75 cadence applied chain-wide regardless of local sell-through.
Analysts rebuild clearance ladders in spreadsheets every Friday from stale inventory extracts.
Aged inventory is discovered when the warehouse flags space, deep into its value decay.
agentification: Models price elasticity per item-location and simulates markdown ladders against sell-through targets.
Recommends localized markdown depth and timing into Revionics with projected margin recovery per decision.
Escalates aging inventory pockets to the Pricing Analyst before they breach the clearance-exit date.

useCases.title: Competitive Price Response Agent

kpis.label: Margin lost to blind price matching

statusQuo: Competitor price files arrive weekly and are reviewed in a spreadsheet on Wednesdays.
Every competitor move on a key item triggers a reflexive match, even on inelastic SKUs.
Price changes queue behind manual approval chains and land after the competitor's promo ends.
agentification: Monitors competitor price feeds continuously and detects moves on key-value items within hours.
Recommends respond/hold/partial-match decisions per item from elasticity and price-image weight, executed through Revionics rules.
Notifies the Pricing Manager of margin-material moves with the modeled impact of each response option.

useCases.title: Promo Forecast Accuracy Analyzer
statusQuo: Lift assumptions are copied from last year's event even when depth, timing, and competition changed.
Post-promo analysis happens for a handful of headline events, months later, in slideware.
Cannibalization and pantry-loading effects are ignored, inflating perceived promo ROI.
agentification: Forecasts event-level lift with decomposition into true incremental, cannibalized, and pulled-forward volume.
Publishes an automated post-event scorecard for every promotion within 72 hours of event close.
Recommends corrected lift factors into Blue Yonder and flags repeatedly unprofitable event types to the Promotions Manager.

useCases.title: Price Execution Audit Monitor

kpis.label: Time to detect a mis-scanned price

statusQuo: Price audits are quarterly store walks with a scan gun on a 200-item sample.
Expired promo prices keep ringing for days after events end, silently eroding margin.
Customers discover mismatches at the register, forcing overrides and eroding trust.
agentification: Reconciles every POS transaction price against the Revionics price of record in near real time.
Detects stale promo prices, missed activations, and unit-of-measure errors by store and item.
Creates fix-it tasks for store teams and escalates systemic feed failures to the Pricing Operations Manager.

useCases.title: Vendor Promo Funding Reconciliation Agent
statusQuo: Deal sheets live in email attachments and are re-keyed into MFCS with frequent errors.
Scan-based funding claims are computed quarterly in a giant workbook nobody else can open.
Millions in committed co-op and markdown support expire unclaimed every year.
agentification: Matches promo execution data — scans, markdowns, ad placements — against vendor deal terms in MFCS automatically.
Generates substantiated funding claims with transaction-level backup and drafts dispute responses.
Notifies the Trade Promotions Analyst of expiring commitments and under-collected deals before quarter close.
